resultList.dtldesc: Discover spacious and comfortable family living with this beautifully designed 3 BHK residential house available for sale in Paras Nagar, Isanpur, Ahmedabad. Located near Green Lawn School in a well-connected residential neighbourhood, this ready-to-move home offers a combination of functionality, privacy and modern conveniences. With thoughtfully planned interiors and additional utility features, the property is suitable for families seeking a comfortable long-term residence.Property SpecificationsBuilt on a plot area of 306 sq. yd, this furnished residential house features a Ground plus 2-floor structure, while the 3rd floor has been planned as an open terrace space. The property has been designed to provide spacious living areas with efficient utilisation of available space.The residence comprises three well-sized bedrooms and four bathrooms planned for comfortable family living. The living and dining areas are arranged separately, creating dedicated spaces for family interactions and enhancing overall functionality.A modular kitchen fitted with a hob provides a practical cooking environment with efficient workspace planning and storage arrangements. The home also includes a dedicated pooja room, adding additional utility and convenience for family requirements.Vitrified flooring enhances the appearance of the interiors while ensuring durability and easy maintenance. The property is Vaastu compliant and enjoys an East-facing orientation. The residence overlooks another building at the front and vacant land at the rear, creating openness and better airflow.Piped gas connectivity through Adani Gas is available, ensuring added convenience for daily use.FacilitiesThe property includes covered parking for secure vehicle accommodation and benefits from regular water supply, power backup support and security provisions.Additional utility features include a 3.3 kW solar system, a 2500-litre underground water tank and a 2000-litre overhead water tank, ensuring efficient resource management and everyday convenience.LocalityThe property enjoys a convenient location with hospitals situated within approximately 500 metres and schools available within around 1 km. The expressway is accessible within approximately 2 km, while NH-8 is located around 1.5 km away, ensuring excellent road connectivity.Railway connectivity is available within approximately 8 km and the airport is situated around 12 to 13 km away. The strategic location and surrounding infrastructure further enhance the propertys residential appeal.
